# Outrix

> Outrix is an AI sales agent that finds prospects, runs LinkedIn outreach, books meetings, and keeps your CRM clean — automatically.

Outrix combines lead discovery, multi-step campaign automation, unified reply management, and pipeline analytics in a single workspace. An AI Sales Brain — trained from the user's LinkedIn profile and knowledge base — personalizes every message and reply.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and sign-in entry point.
- [Sign in](/auth): Create an account or sign in to Outrix.
